mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_chat_rooms.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_rooms (room_id, room_type, room_title, description, max_members, is_private, invite_code, bj_account_id, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, 'GROUP', #{roomTitle}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxMembers}, #{isPrivate}, #{inviteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bjAccountId}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO chat_room_members (room_id, account_id, member_role, joined_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{accountId}, #{role}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT cr.room_id AS "roomId", cr.room_title AS "roomTitle", cr.is_private AS "isPrivate", cr.description AS "description", cr.max_members AS "maxMembers", cr.room_image AS "roomImage", crm.is_favorite AS "isFavorite", NVL(notif.is_muted, 0) AS "isMuted", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_members WHERE room_id = cr.room_id) AS "memberCount", CASE WHEN last_msg.is_deleted = 'Y' THEN '삭제된 메시지입니다.' ELSE TO_CHAR(last_msg.content) END AS "lastMessage", last_msg.created_at AS "lastMessageTime" FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN chat_room_members crm ON cr.room_id = crm.room_id AND crm.account_id = #{myId} LEFT JOIN chat_room_notifications notif ON cr.room_id = notif.room_id AND notif.account_id = #{myId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, content, created_at, is_deleted, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY room_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, message_id DESC) AS rn FROM chat_messages ) last_msg ON cr.room_id = last_msg.room_id AND last_msg.rn = 1 WHERE cr.room_type = 'GROUP' ORDER BY crm.is_favorite DESC, NVL(last_msg.created_at, cr.created_at) DESC

SELECT cr.room_id AS "roomId", cr.room_title AS "roomTitle", cr.description AS "description", cr.is_private AS "isPrivate", cr.max_members AS "maxMembers", cr.bj_account_id AS "bjAccountId", cr.invite_code AS "inviteCode", cr.room_image AS "roomImage", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_members WHERE room_id = cr.room_id) AS "memberCount" FROM chat_rooms cr WHERE cr.room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT cm.message_id, cm.room_id, cm.sender_account_id, cm.message_type, cm.content, cm.is_deleted, cm.created_at, up.nickname AS sender_nickname, up.hati_code AS sender_hati_code, up.gender AS sender_gender, ( SELECT mf2.url FROM media_files mf2 WHERE mf2.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mf2.ref_id = cm.sender_account_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS sender_profile_image_url,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_members crm2 WHERE crm2.room_id = cm.room_id ) - ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_members crm3 WHERE crm3.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm3.last_read_message_id >= cm.message_id ) AS unread_count, mf.file_id, mf.account_id, mf.ref_type, mf.ref_id, mf.url, mf.created_at AS file_created_at FROM chat_messages cm LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON cm.sender_account_id = up.account_id LEFT JOIN media_files mf ON cm.message_id = mf.ref_id AND mf.ref_type LIKE 'CHAT_%' WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC, cm.message_id ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT msg_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_messages (message_id, room_id, sender_account_id, message_type, content) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{senderAccountId}, #{messageType}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT nickname FROM user_profile WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT crm.account_id AS "accountId", crm.member_role AS "memberRole", up.nickname AS "nickname", up.handle AS "handle", up.hati_code AS "hatiCode", up.gender AS "gender", ( SELECT mf.url FROM media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mf.ref_id = crm.account_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS "profileImageUrl" FROM chat_room_members crm JOIN user_profile up ON crm.account_id = up.account_id WHERE crm.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN crm.member_role = 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, up.nickname ASC
SELECT room_id FROM chat_messages WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_room_members SET is_favorite = CASE WHEN is_favorite = 'N' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND account_id = #{myId}

MERGE INTO chat_room_notifications crn USING (SELECT #{roomId} AS room_id, #{myId} AS account_id FROM DUAL) src ON (crn.room_id = src.room_id AND crn.account_id = src.account_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET is_muted = CASE WHEN crn.is_muted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_at = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (room_id, account_id, is_muted, updated_at) VALUES (src.room_id, src.account_id, 1, SYSDATE)
UPDATE chat_rooms SET invite_code = #{inviteCode} WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
